name: openpeep
description: Every file type deserves its own app

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm run build && mkdir -p ../cli/frontend-dist && cp -r dist/* ../cli/frontend-dist/
scripts.build:mcp: cd mcp && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:mcp
scripts.prepack: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const {execSync}=require('child_process'); const hash=execSync('git rev-parse --short HEAD',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim(); const ts=new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:-]/g,'').slice(0,15); fs.writeFileSync('cli/build-info.json', JSON.stringify({build:ts+'-'+hash, builtAt:new Date().toISOString()})+'\n');"
